title: Tracker local dev: bun install before dev, GitHub Packages auth

source.subject: Fix bundling errors for ts services

body:
Local dev bootstrap: GitHub Packages auth via `.npmrc`, bun install before dev, and vite aliases for `@beskid/ui-react` / `@beskid/beskid-ui`.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`328e571`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/328e571)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-29
